stemHtml: Which of the following events qualifies as an aircraft accident?

options.a: An engineer is struck and seriously injured after the crew has already boarded the aircraft.
options.b: A cabin crew member is attacked and seriously injured by a passenger during flight.
options.c: A stowaway is killed by falling from the undercarriage bay during approach.
options.d: During flight an engine turbine destroys the engine and its cowling but causes no other serious damage to the aircraft.
